params.name: Prayer Nut of Christ
params.description: The Prayer Nut of the Passion of Christ is a religious artifact made in the early 16th century, possessing high artistic value and religious significance. Unlike common prayer beads, the prayer nut is a finely carved object that can be opened, with the interior depicting religious scenes related to the Passion of Christ, even including biblical inscriptions. These prayer nuts are usually made of boxwood, with the exterior carved with exquisite patterns, initially used as an aid for religious pra …
